payload.answer: Detected durable updates: Sam is no longer at Goldman and has joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has recently been listening more to early Coltrane. Detected open loop: Daniele is expected to send Sam an article. The article topic is not explicitly specified beyond proximity to the AI infra catch-up, so that linkage is kept cautious.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: The transcript explicitly identifies Sam and Daniele, but no existing entity identifiers are provided. Facts are attributable to Sam's direct statements; the article is referenced but not identified.

Sam still listens to Bill Evans, and lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.

details: Committed only facts explicitly supported by the transcript.
